_comment: Cloudinary crop/gravity table per image type. Deviates from the original spec in two ways, based on confirmed root causes: (1) gravity uses g_face:center or g_auto:subject instead of bare g_face -- bare g_face falls back to `north` (top-crop) when no face is detected, which is the confirmed cause of bad focal points; (2) dpr_auto is added to every non-original-size transform to fix blurriness on retina/high-DPI displays, since a single fixed-pixel asset is otherwise upscaled by the browser. A field's own helpText dimensions (if present) still take precedence over this table at runtime.
